settings.heading: Host Your Next Event
settings.subtext: Ongoing events of all kinds, hosted in a fun and flexible golf environment your guests will genuinely enjoy.

settings.label: Now Registering
settings.subtext: 4 consecutive Friday evenings in May 2026. Progressive skill sessions led by our Head Professional, culminating in a championship competition night.

settings.name: Birthday Parties
settings.description: Celebrate your birthday on the range. Fun for all ages and skill levels — no experience required.

settings.name: Corporate Events & Team Outings
settings.description: Build team chemistry in a relaxed, competitive golf environment. Perfect for groups of any size.

settings.name: Indoor Golf Tournaments
settings.description: Organize competitive play on our Golfzon simulator bays with real-time scoring and world-class courses.

settings.name: School & Youth Group Events
settings.description: Educational and engaging experiences for students and youth organizations with professional instruction.

settings.name: Family Gatherings
settings.description: A welcoming space for families to play, compete, and connect — indoors or on the range.

settings.name: Private Celebrations
settings.description: Reserve the range for your private event. Customizable packages available for any occasion.

settings.types_eyebrow: What We Can Do For You
settings.types_subtext: Whether you're planning something casual or competitive, Northcrest is equipped to host events of all sizes and skill levels.
settings.form_subtext: Share a few details below and our team will follow up to discuss availability, pricing, and next steps.
